zh.lifeSummary: 當Toirdhealbhach macDiarmada Ua Briain於1100年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 高威康納格時，他的父親Diarmait mac Toirdelbach Ua Briain King of Munster42歲，母親Mór Ua Conchobair30歲。他於大約1142年與Sadb MacGillapatrick在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1167年11月7日在愛爾蘭庫迪 克萊爾吉拉阿洛享年67歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 克萊爾吉拉阿洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Toirdhealbhach macDiarmada Ua Briain于1100年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 高威康納格时，他的父亲Diarmait mac Toirdelbach Ua Briain King of Munster42岁，母亲Mór Ua Conchobair30岁。他于大约1142年与Sadb MacGillapatrick在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1167年11月7日在爱尔兰庫迪 克萊爾吉拉阿洛享年67岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 克萊爾吉拉阿洛。

nameMeanings.name: Ua
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Chinese: Teochew form of the surname 柯, see   Ke   1.

variants.name: Ke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Heng, Yong, Bin, Song, Yan, Zhi, Cheng, Chih-Ming, Chun-Yen, Fan, Fong, Gang.  Vietnamese Lan, Hai, Hoa, Le Van, Mui, Tuy.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 柯, meaning ‘bough, stalk’ in Chinese: (i) from the first element of the personal name Ke Lu (柯盧), personal name of a prince of the state of Wu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the first element of the placename Ke Ze (柯澤), the name of a fief (located in Shandong province) granted to an official in the state of Qi during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iii) traced back to the Qiang ethnic group in ancient western China and the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iv) adopted as a surname by the Ke Ba (柯拔) family from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Briain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Brittain  .

variants.name: Brittain
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Anglo-Norman French Bretagne, Bretaign(e) ‘Brittany’. Some of the modern forms are from the Middle English Brytane, Brittan ‘Breton’; compare Breton .

nameMeanings.name: Toirdhealbhach
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name, apparently from a byname meaning ‘instigator’, from toirdhealbh ‘prompting’. It was the name of a High King of Ireland who died in 1156 .

variants.name: Tárlach
meanings: Modern reduced form of Toirdhealbhach , pronounced ‘tor-lakh’.

historicEvents.description: Arrival of Normans at Baginbun in Co. Wexford thus started 800 year struggle between English and Irish.

en.lifeSummary: When Toirdhealbhach macDiarmada Ua Briain was born in 1100, in Connagh, County Galway, Ireland, his father, Diarmait mac Toirdelbach Ua Briain King of Munster, was 42 and his mother, Mór Ua Conchobair, was 30. He married Sadb MacGillapatrick about 1142, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died on 7 November 1167, in Killaloe, County Clare, Ireland, at the age of 67, and was buried in Killaloe, County Clare, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Toirdhealbhach macDiarmada Ua Briain est né en 1100, à Connagh, County Galway, Irlande, son père, Diarmait mac Toirdelbach Ua Briain King of Munster, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Mór Ua Conchobair, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Sadb MacGillapatrick environ 1142, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé le 7 novembre 1167, à Killaloe, County Clare, Irlande, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Killaloe, County Clare, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Toirdhealbhach macDiarmada Ua Briain 1100 in Connagh, County Galway, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Diarmait mac Toirdelbach Ua Briain King of Munster 42 und seine Mutter Mór Ua Conchobair 30. Er hat um 1142 in Irland Sadb MacGillapatrick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb am 7. November 1167 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Killaloe, County Clare, Irland und wurde in Killaloe, County Clare, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Toirdhealbhach macDiarmada Ua Briain è nato il nel 1100 nel Connagh, County Galway, Irlanda, il suo padre, Diarmait mac Toirdelbach Ua Briain King of Munster, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Mór Ua Conchobair, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Sadb MacGillapatrick circa 1142, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì il 7 novembre 1167, nel Killaloe, County Clare, Irlanda, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Killaloe, County Clare, Irlanda.

ja.Connagh, Galway, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ ガルワイコナグ
ja.lifeSummary: Toirdhealbhach macDiarmada Ua Briainが1100年にアイルランドコウントイ ガルワイコナグで生まれた時，父Diarmait mac Toirdelbach Ua Briain King of Munsterは42歳，母Mór Ua Conchobairは30歳であった。約1142年にアイルランドでSadb MacGillapatrickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1167年11月7日にアイルランドコウントイ クラーキラロで67歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ クラーキラロにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Toirdhealbhach macDiarmada Ua Briain(이)가 1100년 아일랜드 카운티 갈웨이 콘아그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Diarmait mac Toirdelbach Ua Briain King of Munster(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Mór Ua Conchobair(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1142년 아일랜드에서 Sadb MacGillapatrick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1167년 11월 7일 아일랜드 카운티 클래르 킬라로이에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 클래르 킬라로이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Toirdhealbhach macDiarmada Ua Briain nasceu em 1100, em Connagh, County Galway, Irlanda, seu pai, Diarmait mac Toirdelbach Ua Briain King of Munster, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Mór Ua Conchobair, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Sadb MacGillapatrick aproximadamente 1142, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu em 7 de novembro de 1167, em Killaloe, County Clare, Irlanda, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Killaloe, County Clare, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Toirdhealbhach macDiarmada Ua Briain родился в 1100 г. в местности коннаг, коунти галвеи, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Diarmait mac Toirdelbach Ua Briain King of Munster было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Mór Ua Conchobair, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Sadb MacGillapatrick около 1142 г. в местности Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер 7 ноября 1167 г. в местности киллало, коунти клар, Ирландия в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности киллало, коунти клар, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Toirdhealbhach macDiarmada Ua Briain nació en 1100, en Connagh, County Galway, Irlanda, su papá, Diarmait mac Toirdelbach Ua Briain King of Munster, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Mór Ua Conchobair, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Sadb MacGillapatrick aproximadamente 1142, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió el 7 de noviembre de 1167, en Killaloe, County Clare, Irlanda, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Killaloe, County Clare, Irlanda.
